creator: des@ofug.org
text:
<keramida@FreeBSD.org> writes:
> Installing a new release `on top' of an old installation should always
> be done *after* a backup of important data.  It is not a safe way of
> upgrading a running system.

The originator stated that he tried to install the compat
distribution, not that he did a binary upgrade.  He may have done a
binary upgrade by mistake, but until we've confirmed that the PR
should remain open.

DES
-- 
Dag-Erling Smorgrav - des@ofug.org
